description: You are using Aerobridge, an open-source drone/UAV fleet management system (admin login: http://localhost:8000/admin/, username: admin, password: adminpass123). Plan a complete aerial survey mission for the Kolkata port area (~22.5726, 88.3639). Create a Flight Plan named 'Kolkata Port Survey' containing a valid GeoJSON Polygon defining the survey area and a non-empty Plan File JSON. Additionally, create a Flight Operation named 'Kolkata Port Inspection' associated with this flight plan using drone 'F1 #2', pilot 'Niteesh Pavani', operator 'Electric Inspection', purpose 'photographing', operation type VLOS, and a scheduled duration from 2026-03-01 09:00:00 to 2026-03-01 11:00:00.
